ORDER FOR VIDEO OR TELEPHONE COURT APPEARANCE FILED

PEO MOT TO RESENTENCE PURS TO PC SECTION 1170(D)(1), FILED AT INSISTENCE

/CAL RESENTENCING ON PC 1170,03 PETITION/DEF APPEARS VIA ZOOM FROM PELICABAY STATE PRISON (CDC #K28861)/CTORD:GUILTY FINDING OF COUNT 1 SET ASIDE,AND MURDER CONVICTION OF COUNT 1 VACATED & DISMISSED/X:COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT GUILTY OF THE LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE OF  COUNT 1, PC 192(A), VOLUNTARY MANSLAUGHTER AND RESENTENCES THE DEFENDANT AS FOLLOWS:/CH3:SP 11Y:U//ENH:CH1:TYPE 12022,5(A)PC:TI 10Y:CS/X:SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 2 REMAINS THE SAME: 16 MONTHS, THE LOW TERM,  TO RUN CONCURRENT TO COUNT 1, /X:TOTAL STATE PRISON = 21 YEARS,/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IN THE AMOUNT TO BE CALCULATED BY CDCR/2933,1(C)/CTORD:SENTENCE DEEMED SERVED/DEF: WAIVES EXCESS CREDITS SOLELY FOR THE PURPOSE OF ALLOWING A TWO YEAR PAROLE PERIOD, AND FOR NO OTHER PURPOSE,/X:THE SENTENCE PRONOUNCED TODAY SHALL RUN CONCURRENT WITH ANY OTHER SENTENCE PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED/ /X:FINES, FEES AND VICTIM RESTITUTION REMAIN AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED,/X:IT IS THE COURT'S REQUEST THAT DEFENDANT BE HOUSED AT THE IMPACT  JUSTICE PROGRAM UPON RELEASE,/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/PAROLE70/PARDATE:WITHIN 24 HOURS OF RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/PAR70/

/CAL POSSIBLE RESENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170,03/ /X SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARION FILED/X:SEALING ORDER FILED/DEF:IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM FROM PELICAN BAYSTATE PRISON, CDCR# K28861/X:VICTIM IMPACT STATEMENT GIVEN BY JANICE CORBIN,/X: STATEMENTS GIVEN BY VARIOUS STROMAN FAMILY MEMBERS & FRIENDS,/X:PETITION FOR RESENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170,03 IS GRANTED,/CONTD:RESENTENCING ON PC 1170,03 PETITION/

/CAL:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS ON PC 1170(D), FRANKLIN HEARING, CDC #K28861/DEF:IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM FROM PELICAN BAY/X:ORDER FOR VIDEO OR TELEPHONE COURTAPPEARANCE FILED,/CONTD:POSSIBLE RESENTENCING ON PC 1170(D) PETITION/DOP/
